headings: 16. What if my agency does not meet all benchmark goals for employment or contracting?
text: If reporting indicates that the agency has not met the Section 3 benchmarks, the agency must report in a method  prescribed  by  HUD  program  offices  on  the  qualitative  nature  of  its  activities  and  those  its contractors and subcontractors pursued per 24 CFR § 75.15(b) and § 75.25(b).
